ValidationRule.description: MIS-1821 check if the opp is closed won and if the ddq is still needed
ValidationRule.errorConditionFormula:
And( RecordType.DeveloperName = 'Supplier_Questionnaires',
ISPICKVAL( Opportunity__r.StageName , "Closed won") , ISBLANK( Additional_Comments__c) , And ( Not(ISPICKVAL( Status__c , "Cancelled")), Not(ISPICKVAL( Status__c , "Completed"))))
ValidationRule.errorMessage: Is the DDQ is still needed after the opp stage is marked as closed-won? 'if yes please specify why the request is still needed in the additional comments or cancel the request please
